series_metadata.series_description: All bidding and supporting documentation including RFP’s, RFQ’s, proposals or similar documents (purchasing, construction, personnel services, etc.).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for seven (7) state fiscal years after the bid is awarded. Destroy when no longer of administrative value. No Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: Retain for seven (7) state fiscal years after the bid is awarded. Destroy when no longer of administrative value. No Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
